items.speaker: Namipon
items.text: Hello again, Passenger! Hm? Where's the other Passenger?

items.speaker: Namipon
items.text: I see, I see. What a shame. I even had dessert ready for her. More for me, I suppose.

items.speaker: Namipon
items.text: This is the reward she promised. She left it in my care for you.

items.speaker: Namipon
items.text: Y'know, when she first wandered in here, she put on a cheerful face. But I could feel the weight on her.

items.speaker: Namipon
items.text: On your little adventure together, did she get any happier?

items.speaker: Namipon
items.text: Wonderful! After all, making sure Honami's people are happy is one of my duties, you know!
